title: Parkio Daily Briefing for May 6, 2026
teaser: World of Frozen opens at Disneyland Paris with Frozen 3 directors touring Arendelle. Cinco de Mayo festivities at EPCOT.

bignews.title: World of Frozen Opens at Disneyland Paris with Frozen 3 Directors Tour
bignews.body: World of Frozen is officially open at Disney Adventure World in Disneyland Paris. Frozen 3 directors Jennifer Lee and Trent Correy toured the new land, sharing insider tips for guests. They recommend experiencing Frozen Ever After, A Celebration in Arendelle show, and dining at Nordic Crowns Tavern. The land features Elsa's Ice Palace, Arendelle Castle, and character meet-and-greets at Rencontre Royale.

topstories.title: Frozen Directors Share Must-Do Experiences in Arendelle
topstories.body: Jennifer Lee and Trent Correy revealed their top recommendations for visiting World of Frozen. Jennifer suggests starting with Frozen Ever After before meeting Anna and Elsa, while Trent prefers beginning with food. Both agree that A Celebration in Arendelle is essential viewing. The directors praised the land's immersive scale and authentic storytelling details.

topstories.title: Nordic Crowns Tavern Offers Hearty Plant-Based Options
topstories.body: The new restaurant at World of Frozen features Nordic-inspired cuisine with substantial vegan offerings. Director Jennifer Lee, who is vegan, highlighted the rich and comforting flavors. The tavern includes storytelling details in its portraits and decor that enhance the Arendelle experience.

icymi.title: Frozen Ever After Features New Songs and Hidden Details
icymi.body: The Disneyland Paris version of Frozen Ever After weaves in moments from Frozen Fever and continues Anna and Elsa's story beyond the first film. Director Trent Correy gave special praise to the Olaf animatronic, calling it perfect. The attraction includes subtle details worth watching for on repeated rides.

spotlight.title: Cinco de Mayo Celebrations Continue at EPCOT
spotlight.body: EPCOT featured special Cinco de Mayo festivities yesterday with the M80's performing as part of the Garden Rocks Concert Series. The celebration included enhanced food offerings and entertainment across the World Showcase. Guests enjoyed rides throughout the day alongside the cultural programming.
